narrative:
Precinct Fultonham (precinct in Muskingum County) has 589 registered voters, with 60.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a clear Republican lean of 7.6 percentage points.
